solutions.title: EV Powertrain Solutions
solutions.description: Complete semiconductor solutions for electric vehicle powertrains, including traction inverters, onboard chargers (OBC), DC-DC converters, and battery management systems. Our solutions enable automotive manufacturers to achieve industry-leading efficiency, power density, and reliability while meeting stringent safety standards.

keyProducts.name: HybridPACK Drive
keyProducts.description: Automotive power modules for main traction inverters

keyProducts.name: CoolSiC MOSFETs
keyProducts.description: Silicon Carbide power devices for high efficiency

caseStudy.title: EV Manufacturer Achieves 5% Range Extension
caseStudy.description: A leading EV manufacturer partnered with BeiLuo to implement Infineon CoolSiC MOSFETs in their 150kW traction inverter. The result was a 5% improvement in overall system efficiency, translating to approximately 25km additional range on a single charge. The compact SiC solution also reduced inverter size by 30%, enabling better vehicle packaging.

faeInsights.quote: When designing EV powertrains, the choice between IGBT and SiC is crucial. For 400V systems under 150kW, IGBT remains cost-effective. However, for 800V architectures or when maximum efficiency is required, SiC is the clear winner. We've helped dozens of customers make this transition successfully.

steps.title: Define System Requirements
steps.description: Determine voltage (400V/800V), power rating, and efficiency targets

steps.title: Select Power Devices
steps.description: Choose between IGBT (cost-optimized) or SiC (performance-optimized) based on power level and efficiency requirements

steps.title: Gate Driver Selection
steps.description: Match gate drivers with appropriate isolation, protection features, and switching speed

steps.title: Control Architecture
steps.description: Select MCU with required safety level (ASIL-D for traction inverters) and processing capability

steps.title: Thermal Design
steps.description: Design cooling system based on power losses and operating conditions

seo.title: EV Powertrain Solutions | Infineon Electric Vehicle | BeiLuo
seo.description: Complete Infineon semiconductor solutions for electric vehicle powertrains. Traction inverters, onboard chargers, DC-DC converters with technical support.

solutions.title: Industrial Motor Drives
solutions.description: High-efficiency motor control solutions for industrial automation, featuring advanced IGBT and SiC power modules with integrated gate drivers and protection features. Our comprehensive portfolio supports applications from 1kW servo drives to 1MW industrial inverters.

keyProducts.name: EconoDUAL3 IGBT
keyProducts.description: High-power IGBT modules for motor drives

keyProducts.name: EiceDRIVER
keyProducts.description: Gate driver ICs with protection features

caseStudy.title: CNC Machine Builder Reduces Energy Consumption by 15%
caseStudy.description: A precision CNC machine manufacturer upgraded their servo drive systems using Infineon EconoDUAL3 IGBTs and optimized gate drivers. The improved switching characteristics reduced switching losses by 20%, resulting in 15% lower overall energy consumption and reduced cooling requirements.

faeInsights.quote: Motor drive design requires careful balance between switching frequency, efficiency, and EMI. For general-purpose VFDs up to 10kHz, IGBT is still the best choice. For high-performance servo drives requiring 16kHz+ switching, consider SiC or advanced IGBT4 technology.

steps.title: Motor and Load Analysis
steps.description: Characterize motor type, power rating, torque-speed curve, and load profile

steps.title: Determine Switching Frequency
steps.description: Select switching frequency based on motor type and acoustic requirements (4-16kHz typical)

steps.title: Power Module Selection
steps.description: Choose IGBT or SiC modules based on power level, frequency, and efficiency targets

steps.title: Gate Driver Design
steps.description: Select gate drivers with appropriate DESAT protection, Miller clamp, and isolation

steps.title: Control Algorithm
steps.description: Implement FOC or V/f control based on performance requirements

seo.title: Motor Drive Solutions | Infineon Industrial | BeiLuo
seo.description: Infineon motor drive solutions for industrial automation. IGBT modules, gate drivers, and MCUs for high-efficiency motor control.

solutions.title: Solar Inverter Solutions
solutions.description: Power conversion solutions for photovoltaic systems, enabling maximum energy harvest and grid stability with high-efficiency SiC and IGBT power modules. Our solutions cover residential, commercial, and utility-scale applications with industry-leading efficiency.

keyProducts.name: XMC MCU
keyProducts.description: Controllers for MPPT and grid management

caseStudy.title: Solar Inverter Manufacturer Achieves 99.1% Peak Efficiency
caseStudy.description: A leading solar inverter manufacturer implemented Infineon CoolSiC MOSFETs in their 50kW three-phase string inverter. The superior switching characteristics of SiC enabled 99.1% peak efficiency and 98.8% weighted efficiency, exceeding industry standards and reducing cooling costs by 40%.

faeInsights.quote: Solar inverter design is all about efficiency. Every 0.1% improvement translates to significant energy harvest over the system lifetime. For inverters above 20kW, SiC is becoming the standard due to its superior performance at high switching frequencies.

steps.title: Define Power and Voltage
steps.description: Determine inverter power rating, DC input voltage range, and AC output voltage

steps.title: Select Topology
steps.description: Choose between H-bridge, NPC, or ANPC topology based on voltage and efficiency requirements

steps.title: Power Device Selection
steps.description: Select SiC for high-frequency designs (>32kHz) or IGBT for cost-sensitive applications

steps.title: MPPT Design
steps.description: Implement multi-channel MPPT with wide voltage range support

steps.title: Grid Connection
steps.description: Design output filter and grid synchronization meeting local grid codes

seo.title: Solar Inverter Solutions | Infineon PV | BeiLuo
seo.description: Infineon solutions for photovoltaic inverters. SiC and IGBT power modules for maximum energy harvest and grid stability.
